items.caption: A graphic design with two main elements: a blue megaphone on the left and a speech bubble on the right. the speech bubble has a black border and an orange background with the words "lost found" written in bold, black capital letters. the megaphone is depicted in a simplified style with a blue outline and white lines suggesting sound waves emanating from it. the overall style of the image is flat with a white background, and it appears to be a conceptual representation of a lost and found service, possibly for a business or a stock illustration.
